headline: Ameren (AEE) Valuation Check After Steady Share Price Momentum And Modest Undervaluation Estimate
summary: Ameren (AEE) overview and recent share performance Ameren (AEE) has been attracting attention after a steady run in its share price, with recent returns over the month and past 3 months prompting investors to reassess how this regulated utility fits into their portfolios. See our latest analysis for Ameren. That short term strength in Ameren’s share price, with a 30 day share price return of 9.68% and a year to date share price return of 12.31%, sits alongside a 1 year total shareholder...

headline: How Ameren’s New 2036 Debt Issue At Ameren (AEE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Ameren Corporation recently completed and priced a US$400 million public offering of 5% senior unsecured notes due May 15, 2036, issued at a slight discount and callable, with proceeds earmarked for general corporate purposes including partial repayment of short-term debt. This fresh layer of fixed-rate, long-dated funding subtly reshapes Ameren’s balance sheet, with implications for its cost of capital, financial flexibility, and how it funds its large planned infrastructure program. We’ll...
